body.title: Suppress 'fallback on error' channel spam
body.result: already closed above — this is a duplicate close call
body.description:
A recurring error is posting 'fallback on error' to the shared channel every few minutes, polluting visibility and making it hard to spot real events.

Either: (1) silence the fallback message entirely (it's a graceful degradation, not an alert-worthy event), (2) drop it to DEBUG log level only, or (3) track down and fix the underlying error being caught.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/channel.py, devices/scraps/, devices/igor/main.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — suppress or reroute the 'fallback on error' channel post; investigate why it's firing repeatedly. OUT — fix all possible fallback-triggering errors (focus on the recurring one visible in channel)
**Completion criteria:** 'fallback on error' no longer appears in the shared channel feed; or if it does, it appears at most once per day and is accompanied by actionable context (the actual error, not just 'fallback')
